label: v2.0.0 canonical (skeleton — pending first calibration pass)
_calibration_protocol: scripts/calibrate_canonical.md (TBD) — operator runs `aelf bench all --canonical --out benchmarks/results/v2.0.0.json` three or more times against the full data dirs (HF datasets cached, /tmp/LoCoMo and /tmp/StructMemEval populated, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set if LLM-judge metrics are in scope), takes the observed range × 1.5 as the per-metric override band, and replaces this skeleton with the result. The harness validates schema_version=2 on read, so a v1 file would be rejected.
